flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Pensacola State College are 9% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($36.7k vs $40.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pensacola State College rose 36% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.5k → $7.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pensacola State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Pensacola State College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (6.8k → 7.5k).
